description_long: This is an ornate wooden cabinet with a rich, dark brown finish and elaborate gold decorative accents. The front features two doors adorned with gold floral and bird motifs, as well as matching gold handles and trim, giving it a luxurious, classical appearance. Above the doors are two drawers, also with gold handles and a Greek key pattern running along the top edge. The sides of the cabinet continue the gold floral motif, while the back is plain and unadorned. The cabinet stands on four short legs and has a solid, flat top suitable for displaying objects. The craftsmanship and embellishments suggest it is designed for both storage and decorative purposes in upscale urban environments.
description: A richly decorated wooden cabinet with gold floral and bird motifs, featuring two doors, two drawers, and ornate trim. The cabinet has a dark brown finish and a flat top for display.
description_view_0: The back of the cabinet is plain, showing a smooth, unadorned wooden panel.
description_view_1: The left side displays gold floral and bird decorations on a brown wood background, with gold trim along the top.
description_view_2: The front view reveals two gold-adorned doors, two drawers, ornate handles, and a Greek key trim along the top edge.
description_view_3: The right side mirrors the left, with matching gold floral and bird decorations and gold trim.
